implementation_summary.summary: CP00-657 bridges the RP21 Admin Console synthetic fixture, test/golden, Hermes evidence, Claude review, closeout handoff, and failure-recovery entry rows across 150 planned units. The slice preserves no-write, no-real-data, descriptor-only permission, audit, fixture, test, review, failure-recovery, Hermes, Claude, and CP658 handoff boundaries without opening Admin Console runtime behavior.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-657 RP21.P06.M06.S04-RP21.P07.M03.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
